6: Live a thousand years twice The one coming in vanity compared to the one of "untimely birth" v3.
8: What hath the wise Should read "What advantage has the wise ...?
10: Man Should Not See Himself As Anything Special (6.10-12).
12: Chapter 7 It Is Good To Be Aware of Death, To Listen To Rebuke, To Behave Wisely, Even Though Life Is Unfair. But The World Is Full of Wickedness.
As We Live Life It Is Good To Remember Its Brevity (7.1-4).
